scripts.build:web: cd ../apps/client && cross-env VITE_STANDALONE=true bun run vite build --base=./ --outDir ../../mobile/www --emptyOutDir
scripts.sync: npm run build:web && cap sync android
scripts.run:android: npm run sync && cap run android
scripts.build:apk: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
